ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the movie (e.g., action, adventure, science fiction) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "budget_adj" INTEGER /* Adjusted budget of the movie */,
  "revenue_adj" INTEGER /* Adjusted revenue of the movie */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Profit generated by the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* A brief, catchy phrase that summarizes the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* A detailed description of the movie's plot */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "mpaa_rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDb ID for the movie */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the movie's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., action, adventure, science fiction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  "example_movies" TEXT /* Example movies that belong to this genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the production company is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the production company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the production company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the production company's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* Notable movies directed by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the cast member */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the cast member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the cast member */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* Notable movies the cast member has appeared in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast_members" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as unhelpful */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being watched */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was watched */,
  "watch_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the watch event in minutes */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the movie was watched to completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
